_autoCloseOnClick.desc: Automatically closes the opened popups after a click.

_autoCloseOnMouseLeave.desc: Automatically closes the opened popup after mouse leaves.

_autoOpen.desc: Opens the top level menu items when the user hovers them.

_autoOpenPopup.desc: Opens the Context Menu when the right-mouse button is pressed. When this property is set to false, the Open and Close functions can be used to open and close the Context Menu.

_autoSizeMainItems.desc: Auto-Sizes the jqxMenu's main items when the menu's mode is 'horizontal'.

_clickToOpen.desc: Opens an item after a click by the user.

_enableHover.desc: Enables or disables the hover state.

_enableRoundedCorners.desc: Enables or disables the rounded corners. This setting has effectin browsers that support the 'border-radius CSS setting.'

_showTopLevelArrows.desc: Show an arrow where there is a submenu.

_animationShowDuration.desc: Gets or sets the duration of the show animation.

_animationHideDuration.desc: Gets or sets the duration of the hide animation.

_animationHideDelay.desc: Gets or sets the delay before the start of the hide animation.

_animationShowDelay.desc: Gets or sets the delay before the start of the show animation.

_autoCloseInterval.desc: Gets or sets the time interval after which all opened items will be closed. When you open a new sub menu, the interval is cleared. If you want to disable this automatic closing behavior of the jqxMenu, you need to set the autoCloseInterval property to 0.

_mode.desc: Gets or sets the menu's display mode.

_easing.desc: Gets or sets the animation's easing to one of the JQuery's supported easings.

_source.desc: Sets the initial contents. Easier to do at runtime.
